ecarx.carext.display.view.window

Interface Window


  • public interface Window
    Window information more detail from 'adb shell dumpsys window windows' see com.android.server.wm.WindowState
    Since:
    6

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getDisplayId()
      Display ID see com.android.server.wm.WindowState#getDisplayId()
      java.lang.String getPackage()
      Get the package name of this window see WindowManager.LayoutParams.packageName
      int getType()
      Get window layer type see WindowManager.LayoutParams.type
      int getUID()
      Get UserId and appId of the owner, the window belongs to see com.android.server.wm.WindowState#mOwnerUid
      int getViewVisibility()
      Get view visibility see com.android.server.wm.WindowState#mViewVisibility
      android.graphics.Rect getWindowFrame()
      Get the window frame see com.android.server.wm.WindowState#mWindowFrames see com.android.server.wm.WindowFrames#mContentFrame see com.android.server.wm.WindowFrames#mVisibleInsets
      java.lang.String getWindowIdentity()
      Get the window identity see com.android.server.wm.WindowState#getName()
      java.lang.String getWindowTag()
      Get the window tag see com.android.server.wm.WindowState#getWindowTag()
